title: Care Hospitals Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Care Hospitals Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Care Hospitals Ventures Solutions are looking for an experienced Consultant Physician based out of Mumbai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Care Hospitals Ventures Solutions:
Care Hospitals Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Health Informatics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Care Hospitals Ventures Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
